name: PER_CALENDAR_EVENTS_VL
query: SELECT PCE.CALENDAR_EVENT_ID CALENDAR_EVENT_ID, PCE.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, PCE.SHORT_CODE SHORT_CODE, PCE.CATEGORY CATEGORY, PCE.START_DATE_TIME START_DATE_TIME, PCE.END_DATE_TIME END_DATE_TIME, PCE.COVERAGE_TYPE COVERAGE_TYPE, PCE.TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE, PCE.TREE_CODE TREE_CODE, PCE.TREE_VERSION_ID TREE_VERSION_ID, PCE.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, PCE.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, PCE.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, PCE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PCE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PCE.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PCETL.NAME NAME, PCETL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, PCE.HALF_DAY_FOR_ELAPSED HALF_DAY_FOR_ELAPSED, PCE.EVENT_TYPE, PCE.ALL_DAY_FLAG FROM PER_CALENDAR_EVENTS PCE, PER_CALENDAR_EVENTS_TL PCETL WHERE PCETL.CALENDAR_EVENT_ID = PCE.CALENDAR_EVENT_ID AND PCETL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
